name: broker-user-session
description: Coach as disciplined CFD broker user: entity, risk, leverage, edge-vs-luck

steps.text: Broker user model session — risk capital, entity-first, no live autotrade.

steps.prompt:
Act with skill broker-user-model. User is a retail CFD/forex client. If knowledge/brokers/ec-markets-regulation.md exists, use it as background. Deliver:
1) Opening stance (risk capital only)
2) Pre-deposit entity/licence checklist
3) Leverage and position-sizing rules of thumb (education, not advice)
4) How to reject marketing floors (0-pip spreads)
5) When to run edge-vs-luck on a system
6) What the agent will refuse to do (live orders without explicit enable)
Verdict-first. Not financial advice.
